MVP-61 department-gated runtime corps

5,000-Agent Department-Gated Runtime Corps

Scale supervised runtime capacity to 5,000 agents only through approved department gates. 5,000 is a cap, not an automatic activation. Department-gated activation is required. Raw fleet activation is blocked.

Total registered agents: 47,979 Total departments: 1,777 MVP-61 global runtime cap: 5,000 Max cohort activation size: 500 Max operation chunk size: 250 Full 47,979 activation: blocked Raw 5,000-agent activation: blocked

Kill switch

Visible and ready

No department can run commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions from this page.

Kill switch visible Department approval is not command execution. Activation means supervised runtime capacity only.

Loading backend state...

Global runtime corps status

Cap and safety panel

Department-gated activation is required. The current live runtime state only expands through approved department gates and never through raw fleet activation.

Current live runtime agents 0 Combined live capacity across active gates and cohorts
Global runtime cap 5,000 Hard stop for MVP-61
Max cohort activation size 500 Maximum supervised cohort request
Max operation chunk size 250 Chunked activation and deactivation boundary
Approved department gates 0 Approved or active gates ready for cohorts
Active department gates 0 Currently carrying supervised runtime capacity
Active cohorts 0 Currently enabled corps cohorts
